description: Style Note Tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs - fashion-forward yet classic, this piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Pink leopard printed one shoulder top, elastication at the sleeve origin, has a flutter sleeve and gathers at the sides above the hemMaterial and Care 100% polyesterHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
